roles.name: Master of the Sword
roles.description: Six-fingered swordmaster of design — shapes the over-arching Salesforce solution and defends its honor.

roles.name: Captain of the Guard
roles.description: Marshals the brute squad of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the prince.

roles.name: Keeper of the Castle Ledger
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets — knows every door of the castle.

roles.name: Court Alchemist
roles.description: Brews Apex, LWC, and platform features in the back of the miracle shop.

roles.name: Dread Pirate of the Practice
roles.description: Captain over all American Salesforce craft — sets standards and trains the next Roberts.

roles.name: Spanish Swordmaster
roles.description: Patrols requirements with practiced craft — hello, my name is Inigo, you killed my data model, prepare to refactor.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Brotherhood
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the swordmaster's eye.

roles.name: Architect of the Cliffs
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond the Cliffs of Insanity.

roles.name: Climber of the Cliffs
roles.description: Lays the rope of API, middleware, and event flows under the architect's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Climber
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of error handling on the rocks.

roles.name: Royal Healer of the Houses
roles.description: Tends the mostly-dead and the all-dead — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the prince.

roles.name: Herald of the Crown
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for the royal wedding — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Trumpeter of the Royal Wedding
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert the kingdom.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of Florin
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Council Scribe of the Crown
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between the prince's wishes and the alchemist's craft.

roles.name: Master Smith of Andalusia
roles.description: Forges the most senior Apex and platform features in the great American foundries.

roles.name: Stable Boy of the Farm
roles.description: As you wish — fetches, configures, and learns the craft from Westley himself.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Westley & Buttercup — True Love Reunification CRM
Florin Court — Royal Wedding Operations Platform
Mountain Cottage — Miracle Pill Manufacturing System

westley-and-buttercup.name: Farm Boy Departs
westley-and-buttercup.description: Discovery sign-off — Westley sets sail to seek his fortune.

westley-and-buttercup.name: Reforging as Roberts
westley-and-buttercup.description: Build kickoff: the new Dread Pirate Roberts takes the helm.

westley-and-buttercup.name: Battle of Wits at the Table
westley-and-buttercup.description: Mid-project gate: iocane powder showdown with Vizzini.

westley-and-buttercup.name: Through the Fire Swamp
westley-and-buttercup.description: Phase invoice trigger: survived lightning sand and the R.O.U.S.

westley-and-buttercup.name: True Love's Kiss
westley-and-buttercup.description: Go-Live: reunited with Buttercup at last.

westley-and-buttercup.name: Sail into the Sunset
westley-and-buttercup.description: Hyper-care close: the four heroes ride white horses into the east.

florin-court.name: Royal Engagement Announced
florin-court.description: Project kickoff: the prince announces his betrothal to the bride.

florin-court.name: Suits of Armor Forged
florin-court.description: Build phase: castle defenses prepared for the wedding.

florin-court.name: Mawage Rehearsal
florin-court.description: UAT gate: the Impressive Clergyman runs through the ceremony.

florin-court.name: The Wedding Ceremony
florin-court.description: Go-Live: the royal wedding takes place (briefly).

florin-court.name: Storming of the Castle
florin-court.description: Hyper-care close: Inigo and Fezzik lead the assault.

florin-court.name: Crown Recompense
florin-court.description: Final invoice from the throne room.

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Wheelbarrow Arrives
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Discovery: a mostly-dead patient is wheeled to the door.

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Brew the Miracle Pill
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Build: chocolate-coated cure manufactured in the back room.

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Valerie's Sign-Off
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Solution review with the lady of the house — liar, liar!

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Patient Revived
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Go-Live: the dead boy lives, briefly, then walks.

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Frame Story Closes
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Project close: grandfather closes the storybook.

mountain-cottage-crew.name: Final Reading Invoice
mountain-cottage-crew.description: Final invoice for the bedtime engagement.

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Brute Squad Mustered
wilds-and-misadventures.description: Kickoff council in the Thieves' Forest — anybody not in the brute squad?

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Survey the Fire Swamp
wilds-and-misadventures.description: Discovery: hazards mapped — flame spurts, lightning sand, R.O.U.S.

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Construct the Pit of Despair
wilds-and-misadventures.description: Build: dungeon machine assembled and calibrated by the Albino.

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Hazard Acceptance Trial
wilds-and-misadventures.description: UAT acceptance: the wilds are signed off as fit for misadventure.

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Storm the Castle Together
wilds-and-misadventures.description: Go-Live + handoff: the squad joins the assault on Florin Castle.

wilds-and-misadventures.name: Cooperative Settlement
wilds-and-misadventures.description: Final invoice from the Brute Squad & Wilds Cooperative.

Westley.notes: Recovery at the cottage — mostly-dead convalescence.

Inigo Montoya.notes: Searching for the six-fingered man — pre-arranged.

Fezzik.notes: Rhyming workshop — anybody want a peanut?

Vizzini.notes: Inconceivable! — pondering a battle of wits.

Miracle Max.notes: Recovering from being fired by Humperdinck — humiliations galore.

Valerie.notes: Yelling at Humperdinck through the door.

The Grandfather.notes: Looking for a different bedtime book.

The Grandson.notes: Sick day — actual flu, not just acting.
